series_metadata.series_description: Surveys sent to all Auditor of State employees consisting of an employees opinion, comment and/or suggestion on improving the Auditors office.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain one month after compulated into a final report. Maintain final report for one (1) year. ; Paper: Retain while needed, then destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
